summary: Derived quarterly APAC revenue from TTM data. Q4 2024 APAC ~$15.38B, Q1 2025 ~$14.96B. YoY growth 8-12% recently.
content:
Quarterly APAC revenue (derived from TTM):
Q4 2022: $12.20B, Q4 2023: $14.20B (+16.4%), Q4 2024: $15.38B (+8.3%)
Q1 2025: $14.96B (+11.6% YoY)
APAC share of total: ~15.9% (Q4) to 16.6% (Q1)
Q4/Q3 seasonal ratio average: 1.123
FY2024 CC growth was +1pp above reported (15% vs 14%)
